seo_content:
QT Funded 50% OFF Deal

QT Funded is offering an exceptional 50% discount on QT Prime challenge accounts using code QT50. This promotion also includes a FREE Instant account of the same size as your purchased QT Prime challenge — effectively making this a buy-one-get-one deal at half price. For traders looking to maximize their funded capital exposure per dollar spent, this is one of the highest-value single promotions in the current prop trading market.

QT Funded operates within the QuantTekel ecosystem — a proprietary financial technology environment built to support serious funded traders with cutting-edge tools, robust account management, and a focus on instant profit flow. The firm has gained recognition for combining technological innovation with trader-centric promotional structures that reward committed traders with outsized value.

With code QT50, you purchase a QT Prime challenge at 50% of the standard price and simultaneously receive a free Instant account of matching size. This dual-account approach means you have two simultaneous paths to profitability: the challenge track, where you are working toward funded status through the evaluation, and the instant account, where you can begin trading and earning payouts immediately. The instant account profit flow begins from day one without any evaluation requirements.

QT Funded's trading conditions through the QuantTekel ecosystem include access to professional trading platforms, competitive profit splits on funded accounts, and clearly defined challenge parameters. The QT Prime challenge structure is designed for traders ready to demonstrate professional-level performance, with standard profit targets and drawdown rules. Payout processing is handled through the QuantTekel platform's integrated payment infrastructure.

To claim this BOGO deal, visit QT Funded via the affiliate link above, select the QT Prime challenge at your preferred account size, and enter QT50 at checkout. Your 50% discount will be applied and your free Instant account of the same size will be added to your order automatically. Review the QT Prime challenge terms on the QuantTekel site to confirm the profit targets and drawdown parameters before purchasing.
